overall.description: Sci-fi game footage depicting a character in a dimly lit spaceship interior. The character uses a wrist-mounted holographic device to receive a video call and review audio logs. The clip concludes with a perspective shift to third-person as the character opens a storage locker.

scene_state.functional_zone: spaceship crew quarters with personal storage locker

events.description: video call ends and holographic display transitions to data log interface

agents.ego_description: holding arm steady to view incoming holographic video call on wrist device

notable_agents.action: woman speaking on holographic display, appearing concerned during the video transmission

entered.detail: futuristic wrist-mounted display showing green-tinted holographic interface
vertical metal storage locker with handle in the background
green padded jacket sleeve with orange stitching details

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view of a character's wrist with a holographic device displaying a video call with a woman. The setting is a dimly lit, industrial spaceship interior with a metal locker visible in the background. The character remains stationary, focusing on the conversation.

scene_state.functional_zone: spaceship crew quarters with personal storage locker

events.description: interface switches to audio log selection screen with waveform visualizations
user scrolls through text-based data logs on the holographic display

agents.ego_description: navigating through the wrist device's menu system, reviewing audio and text logs

segments.scene_description: Following the video call, the character continues to interact with the wrist device, now navigating through various data logs and audio recordings. The holographic display shows different interfaces including waveform visualizations and text entries while the background remains unchanged.

scene_state.functional_zone: spaceship crew quarters with personal storage locker

events.description: holographic display powers down, screen goes dark
camera perspective shifts from first-person to third-person over-the-shoulder
character reaches forward and opens the metal locker door

agents.ego_description: powering down the wrist device and opening the storage locker

entered.detail: character's back and shoulder visible in third-person perspective wearing green jacket

segments.scene_description: The device screen powers down and the camera shifts to a third-person view behind the character. The character reaches toward the metal locker and opens it, revealing the interior storage space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous perspective that shifts from an intimate first-person interaction with technology to a third-person view of the surrounding industrial environment. It begins with a close-up of a wrist-mounted holographic device displaying a video call with a woman within a dimly lit spaceship interior. As the call ends, the camera remains focused on the wrist as the interface transitions into a series of data logs and audio waveforms. The scene then shifts as the holographic display powers down, pulling the camera back to reveal the character from behind. Finally, the perspective expands to show the character reaching out to open a metal storage locker, exposing its interior.
